Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Continued To Jan-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Petitioner. William Schofield for Adrienne Brown (Respondent).

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 18, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by January 15, 2012. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on January 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The closing statements of the sale will be turned over to Ms. Calhoun.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Orders: 1) Confirming Teatamentary Trust'S Ownership Of One-Third Of Net Income, Laon Proceeds, Anf Sale Proceeds From 725 3rd Avenue; Ec
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Continued To Oct-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Schofield for Adrianne Brown-Edington. Emilie Calhoun for Calvin Brown and Shannon Jackson.

The matter was continued to October 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Schofiled to have the opportunity to file written objection/response.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.
